title: Pokeball
description: With this little datapack you can catch some mobs with Pokeballs.
body:
<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/eM0l2TG_l0k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Use the Q key (default) to throw a Pokeball.

Throwing a Pokeball is 2 times stronger than throwing a normal item. After landing, the pokeball opens and tries to catch the mob. Then it closes and automatically tries to return to the player.

**Don't try to catch the mob while the player is sitting on it!**

![Pokeball Shell](https://i.imgur.com/78AlwKr.png)

## Crafting
### Pokeball Shell
![Pokeball Shell](https://i.imgur.com/5NqBbq2.png)

First you need to craft a Pokeball Shell on the crafting table.
After that, add Nether Star and Netherite Ingot on the Smithing Table.

### Pokeball
![Pokeball](https://i.imgur.com/GPskSnN.png)

Requires general [GalLab resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gallab)
